name: Cosmic Entity Card
description: A massive, single-eyed alien whose unblinking stare can pierce even the bravest of hearts.

name: Fangroot Card
description: A twisted root from another world, snapping and biting with unnatural hunger.

name: Voidspawn Card
description: A towering alien with one glaring eye, wielding shadowy powers that shouldn’t exist in this realm.

name: Voidgazer Card
description: Smaller than its cyclopean kin, but just as unnerving—this alien’s eye glows with strange energy.

name: Bogbloom Card
description: A bizarre plant from another world, its vines lash out with a hunger that feels far too intelligent.

name: Cinderspike Card
description: A jagged alien beast, covered in crystalline spines sharp enough to pierce steel.

name: Sporeling Card
description: A strange fungal creature from beyond, releasing alien spores that twist and warp anything they touch.

name: Little Star Card
description: A glowing alien entity shaped like a star, radiating energy from beyond.

name: Twinkle Card
description: A playful cosmic being, its sparkle hides dangerous bursts of starlight.

name: Blazewheel Card
description: A bizarre alien that rolls forward like a wheel, crushing everything in its path.

name: Ashrend Card
description: The broken remains of an alien creature or machine… but it still twitches with hostile life.

name: Angel Mage Card
description: Don't let the robes fool you; this angel packs a magical punch. Prayers are optional, though!

name: Angel Card
description: A serene celestial being who's always ready to spread some heavenly wrath. Sweet but deadly!

name: Archangel Card
description: Majestic wings and a heart of gold, or is it? This angel has a dark side when provoked!

name: Bat Lord Card
description: The king of bats. Don't ask for autographs; he's too busy hunting you down.

name: Bat Card
description: Tiny wings, big attitude! This bat's more trouble than a pack of mosquitoes.

name: Bee Card
description: Always buzzing around, this little guy's only goal is to ruin your day with a sting.

name: Bird Card
description: Fluttering through the air, this bird is more than capable of making your life... interesting.

name: Bloom Card
description: A plant that seems sweet at first, but don't let it fool you, it can make you regret that hug.

name: Blossom Card
description: Like a flower, but with a grudge. Approach with caution, this one's got a temper.

name: Bomb Card
description: This mischievous monster might look cute, but it's got an explosive personality.

name: Boxy Robot Card
description: A clunky, cube-shaped machine with more power than looks. Don’t underestimate its blocky frame.

name: Bud Card
description: Small, but don't be fooled, this budding little guy is just waiting to blossom into something scary!

name: Bumble Card
description: Cute, fuzzy, and always on the move. It's just trying to spread some chaos, not honey!

name: Bunny Card
description: This little fluffball might look harmless... but its bite is worse than its bark!

name: Burrow Card
description: Hidden beneath the sand, this beast's got a lot of attitude, and a lot of dirt.

name: Butterfly Fairy Card
description: With wings of magic and a dash of mischief, this fairy loves to sprinkle a little trouble!

name: Butterfly Hue Card
description: It's a fluttery little critter that might leave you enchanted, or just itchy.

name: Butterfly Pixie Card
description: Magical and mischievous, this pixie might give you a wink before causing havoc.

name: Cacti Card
description: A prickly friend with a sharp personality, don't try hugging it!

name: Cactus King Card
description: The king of the desert, spiky, stubborn, and a little too proud of his pointy crown.

name: Cactus Card
description: This cactus doesn't just rule the desert; it rules with an iron fist... er, spines.

name: Cat Bolt Card
description: Lightning-fast and furious, this cat's got a spark in its step, and it's shocking!

name: Cat Lightning Card
description: A cat that's got more than just nine lives, it's got nine lightning strikes, too!

name: Cat Meow Card
description: A simple meow from this furry feline, and your world might just get turned upside down.
stats: Chance to autocast Thunderbolt when attacking: +10%

name: Chick Card
description: Small, yellow, and probably plotting your doom under all that cuteness.

name: Creeper Card
description: Sneaky and sly, this creepy crawly has a penchant for lurking in the shadows.

name: Cyclops Bat Mage Card
description: This cyclops has learned a thing or two from the dark arts, expect spells with a side of fury.

name: Cyclops Bat Wizard Card
description: A master of shadowy magic and even shadier business. It's a nightmare in the making.

name: Cyclops Bat Card
description: Big, bad, and batty. This one's got its sights set on you, so run, if you can!

name: Cyclops Giant Card
description: Tall, angry, and completely unhinged. Good luck trying to make it past this one!

name: Cyclops Minion Card
description: A smaller cyclops, but still just as dangerous. This one's all about taking orders, yours.

name: Cyclops Card
description: One eye, two fists, and a serious vendetta. You won't see this one coming!

name: Death Mage Card
description: A mage of death, weaving necromantic spells with a sinister smile. Don't cross him.

name: Death Card
description: This shadowy figure isn't here for a chat, it's here to remind you of your inevitable fate.

name: Delivery Robot Card
description: An oddly helpful machine repurposed for war, tossing deadly “packages” your way.

name: Direwolf Card
description: A savage wolf larger than most, feared for its cunning and the chilling howls that echo through the night.

name: Dog Bark Card
description: A yappy, fiery little dog that might just catch you off guard with a fiery surprise!

name: Dog Bowwow Card
description: Bigger, badder, and ready to bite. It's got a bark, but it's got firepower too!

name: Dog Pup Card
description: A tiny pup with a fiery heart, it might just be looking for a snack... or you!
stats: Chance to autocast Firebolt when attacking: +10%

name: Dragon Blizzard Card
description: A dragon that brings a chill to your bones, and not the friendly kind!

name: Dragon Darkness Card
description: It's not just the dark; it's the dragon's deadly presence in the shadows you should fear.

name: Dragon Dusk Card
description: This dragon brings with it an eerie calm... but you'll soon realize it's anything but peaceful.

name: Dragon Fire Card
description: A fiery force of nature, this dragon's breath could cook you in seconds.

name: Dragon Ice Card
description: Don't let the icy breath fool you, this dragon's just as cold-hearted as it is powerful.

name: Dragon Inferno Card
description: It's all about heat and destruction with this fiery dragon. Think you can handle the burn?

name: Dragon Nightfall Card
description: A shadowy dragon that comes with a cold chill and a lot of bite. Proceed with caution.

name: Dragon Spark Card
description: It may start with a spark, but this dragon has a blazing fire waiting for you!

name: Dragon Water Card
description: Water's their element, and they're not afraid to drown you in it!

name: Dragonfly Arrow Card
description: Fast and sharp, this dragonfly isn't just here to flutter by. It's a skilled hunter!

name: Dragonfly Darner Card
description: A little faster and a lot deadlier than most, this dragonfly can dart through the air like lightning.

name: Dragonfly Swift Card
description: With speed that'll leave you dizzy, this dragonfly's all about a quick strike.

name: Earthworm Card
description: A simple creature, but digging through the dirt is just the beginning of its underground trouble.

name: Egg Card
description: It might look innocent, but it's got big, scary plans for when it hatches!

name: Egglet Card
description: A tiny egg with legs! Cute, but it’s plotting something sinister inside its shell.

name: Elder Wisp Blue Card
description: A calm, ancient spirit that glows with icy blue energy, chilling the air and soothing—or freezing—all nearby.

name: Elder Wisp Purple Card
description: A mysterious spirit wrapped in violet flame, whispering secrets and curses from another realm.

name: Elder Wisp Yellow Card
description: A luminous spirit that radiates golden light, guiding the lost but blinding its foes with brilliance.

name: Eyeball Bat Blue Card
description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!

name: Eyeball Bat Green Card
description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!

name: Eyeball Bat Red Card
description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!
stats: Chance to autocast Life Drain when hit: +1% per refine

name: Eyeball Creep Blue Card
description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

name: Eyeball Creep Green Card
description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

name: Eyeball Creep Red Card
description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

name: Eyeball Mage Blue Card
description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

name: Eyeball Mage Green Card
description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

name: Eyeball Mage Red Card
description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

name: Fire Mage Card
description: A fire mage with enough power to make the volcano look like a campfire.

name: Fire Card
description: They may have a name that sounds harmless, but this little guy will set everything ablaze.

name: Flame Card
description: With a fiery spirit and a burning desire to cause chaos, this fiery being isn't messing around!

name: Fledgling Card
description: It's just a little bird... until it starts pecking your face off.

name: Flora Card
description: Don't touch the plants! They bite.

name: Flower Pot Monster Card
description: What looks like a simple flower pot is hiding some very hungry roots.

name: Fungi Card
description: Mushrooms have never been so deadly, this fungi is always on the hunt for a tasty meal!

name: Ghost Card
description: A spooky figure with a lot of haunting potential, this ghost isn't here for a chat.

name: Glow Wisp Blue Card
description: A twinkling light spirit, calm and cool, but more mischievous than it seems.

name: Glow Wisp Purple Card
description: A tiny spirit flickering with violet glow, playful yet strangely unsettling.

name: Glow Wisp Yellow Card
description: A cheerful little spark of golden light, bringing warmth—and sometimes burns.

name: Goblin Giant Devil Card
description: A big, burly goblin with a lot of brawn, and an attitude to match.

name: Goblin King Card
description: A big, burly goblin with a lot of brawn, and an attitude to match.

name: Goblin Giant Mage Card
description: A big, burly goblin with a lot of brawn, and an attitude to match.

name: Goblin Minion Card
description: A small goblin that works in packs and loves to cause trouble for anyone in its path.

name: Goblin Trooper Assassin Card
description: A small goblin that works in packs and loves to cause trouble for anyone in its path.

name: Goblin Trooper Mage Card
description: A goblin soldier who fights with a crude, yet deadly efficiency.

name: Goblin Trooper Soldier Card
description: A goblin soldier who fights with a crude, yet deadly efficiency.

name: Goblin Trooper Card
description: A goblin soldier who fights with a crude, yet deadly efficiency.

name: Goblin Warblade Card
description: A goblin champion wielding a massive blade, reckless but deadly in battle.

name: Goblin Warchief Card
description: The toughest goblin of the horde, rallying its kin with brute force and bellowing war cries.

name: Goblin Warcrusher Card
description: This goblin prefers brute force, smashing anything in sight with overwhelming strength.

name: Goblin Warlock Card
description: A goblin twisted by dark magic, summoning flames and shadows to terrorize friend and foe alike.

name: Golem Earth Card
description: This giant stone golem is as tough as the earth itself, don't expect to break it easily!

name: Golem Fire Card
description: Made of fire and fury, this golem can heat things up pretty quickly!

name: Golem Ice Card
description: An icy golem that's as cold as its surroundings, don't get too close!

name: Gripper Robot Card
description: A claw-armed contraption designed to crush and hold its prey with unrelenting grip.

name: Hare Card
description: Quick, nimble, and ready to dash away at the slightest sign of danger.

name: Haunt Card
description: A specter of doom, this haunting presence will chill you to the bone.

name: Hermit King Card
description: This hermit has a crown, and it's not afraid to use it. Watch out!

name: Horror Card
description: This nightmare of a monster is too terrifying for words. Beware the darkness it brings!

name: Housefly Icky Card
description: A pesky, buzzing housefly that's always in your face, bringing discomfort wherever it goes.

name: Housefly Junk Card
description: A larger, more annoying version of the common housefly, often found around filth and decay.

name: Housefly Nom Card
description: A particularly stubborn fly that enjoys buzzing around food and irritating travelers.

name: Ice Mage Card
description: A mage who bends ice and snow to their will, summoning storms to chill the bones of their enemies.

name: Ice Card
description: A cold and unfeeling monster that freezes everything in its path, leaving nothing but frost.

name: Icicle Card
description: A sharp shard of ice that's as deadly as it is cold, capable of impaling anything in its way.

name: Imp Demon Card
description: A mischievous demon with fiery red skin and a knack for causing trouble wherever it appears.

name: Imp Devil Card
description: A devilish imp that delights in tormenting others, often using its fiery powers for chaos.

name: Imp Mischief Card
description: A playful imp that likes to prank and trick its victims, sometimes to deadly effect.
stats: Chance to reflect single target magic: +2% per refine

name: Stormjelly Card
description: A floating machine with pulsing lights and electric stingers, drifting gracefully before it shocks.

name: Lurker Card
description: A sneaky and silent predator that hides in the shadows, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

name: Mega Ice Golem Card
stats: Chance to autocast Ice Shard when hit: +1% per refine

name: Mole Rat King Card
description: The ruler of the mole rats, much larger and more dangerous, capable of commanding its kin.

name: Mole Rat Card
description: A subterranean rat that burrows through the ground, leaving a trail of destruction in its wake.

name: Mosquito Bug Card
description: A pesky insect that buzzes around, sucking the blood of any living creature it can find.

name: Mosquito Pester Card
description: A relentless mosquito that constantly hounds its victims, drawing blood with each attack.

name: Mosquito Stinger Card
description: A mosquito with a deadly, venomous sting that leaves its victim weakened and drained.

name: Moth Celestial Card
description: A majestic moth with ethereal wings, capable of manipulating light and causing illusions.

name: Moth Luna Card
description: A mystical moth that draws power from the moon, casting spells of mystery and enchantment.

name: Moth Moon Card
description: A celestial moth that brings moonlit magic, able to summon lunar energy to protect or harm.

name: Mushroom Card
description: A giant, toxic mushroom that can release spores to poison or confuse those who get too close.

name: Nightmare Card
description: A terrifying creature that haunts the dreams of the living, bringing fear and nightmares to all.

name: Petal Card
description: A delicate and beautiful creature made of petals, yet capable of unleashing deadly thorns.

name: Phantom Card
description: A shadowy figure that haunts the land, vanishing as quickly as it appears, leaving only fear.

name: Plant Chewer Card
description: A plant-eating creature with large teeth, capable of tearing through even the toughest foliage.

name: Poison Bomb Card
description: A grotesque blob brimming with toxins, exploding into clouds of poisonous gas when provoked.

name: Pollen Card
description: A small, flying creature that spreads pollen to cause havoc, often disorienting its prey.

name: Posy Card
description: A small, innocent-looking flower creature, but don't be fooled, it's more dangerous than it seems.
stats: Chance to autocast Icebolt when attacking: +10%

name: Queen Worm Card
description: The monstrous queen of the worms, large and powerful, capable of commanding legions of smaller worms.

name: Rabbit Card
description: A swift and skittish creature, often seen hopping around in the wild, but not to be underestimated.

name: Razor Robot Card
description: A machine bristling with blades, slicing through anything foolish enough to get close.

name: Scorpion King Card
description: A massive scorpion with an oversized tail, its poison stronger and deadlier than its smaller kin.

name: Scorpion Card
description: A venomous arachnid with a deadly tail, lurking in the desert or other hostile environments.

name: Scorpling Card
description: A baby scorpion that's quick and dangerous, often found in swarms to overwhelm its prey.

name: Seed Card
description: A tiny but dangerous plant creature that grows rapidly, surrounding its prey with thorny vines.

name: Shade Card
description: A shadowy figure that seems to move with the darkness, capable of blending into any environment.

name: Shadow Card
description: A creature of darkness that is able to manipulate shadows, striking unseen from the gloom.

name: Shell Robot Card
description: A heavily armored machine with a near-impenetrable shell, slow but unstoppable.

name: Shell Card
description: A tough, armored creature that can retract into its shell, making it nearly invincible to attacks.

name: Skeleton Giant Card
description: A massive skeletal warrior that uses its size and strength to crush opponents with ease.

name: Skeleton Mage Card
description: A spellcasting skeleton, summoning dark magic to ensnare or destroy its enemies.

name: Skeleton Card
description: A reanimated skeleton with the ability to wield weapons or fight bare-handed in death.

name: Snake Naga Card
description: A half-snake, half-human creature with powerful magic and deadly combat abilities.

name: Snake Card
description: A slithering serpent that strikes with venomous speed, often hiding in tall grass or dark corners.
stats: Chance to autocast Venom Strike when attacking: +10%

name: Snakelet Card
description: A small and sneaky serpent that hides in the underbrush, striking with venomous fangs.

name: Snout Robot Card
description: A huffing, puffing contraption that blasts bursts of steam and smoke to suffocate foes.

name: Snow Bomb Card
description: A frosty creature packed with icy powder, ready to burst into a chilling explosion.

name: Soul Mage Card
description: A mage who channels the power of souls, able to summon spirits to do its bidding.

name: Soul Card
description: A Elusive figure with no physical form, it haunts the living, draining energy from those it touches.

name: Spider King Card
description: The king of all spiders, with a larger, deadlier body and the ability to command arachnid minions.

name: Spider Queen Card
description: The metallic matriarch of mechanized spiders, spinning webs of steel and circuits.

name: Spider Robot Card
description: A mechanical spider that scuttles with eerie precision, weaving metallic traps.

name: Spider Toxin Card
description: A particularly venomous spider, its bite causes intense pain and paralysis in its victims.

name: Spider Card
description: A venomous arachnid with eight legs and a penchant for building deadly webs to trap its prey.

name: Spiderling Robot Card
description: Smaller but no less menacing, these tiny bots swarm in mechanical packs.

name: Spike Robot Card
description: A spiked machine that turns defense into offense—get too close and you’ll regret it.

name: Spike Card
description: A creature covered in sharp, deadly spikes, making it a dangerous opponent at close range.

name: Spook Card
description: A Elusive entity that frightens and disorients its prey, often causing them to panic.

name: Spore Card
description: A tiny creature that releases dangerous spores that can poison or confuse its victims.

name: Sprout Card
description: A small, young plant creature that grows rapidly, using vines and roots to ensnare its enemies.
stats: Chance to autocast Earthbolt when attacking: +10%

name: Sting Card
description: A small but fierce creature that delivers powerful stings, often found in large swarms.

name: Stormstinger Card
description: A buzzing machine armed with a piercing stinger, darting in and out like a mechanical wasp.

name: Sun Blossom Card
description: A radiant creature that glows with the power of the sun, often used for healing or offensive light magic.

name: Sunflora Pixie Card
description: A tiny fairy-like creature made of sunlight, capable of casting blinding beams of light.

name: Sunflower Fairy Card
description: A sun-dwelling fairy that controls sunlight, often brightening the area or unleashing solar magic.

name: Stormcoil Card
description: A writhing machine with steel tendrils, grabbing and crushing everything it can reach.

name: Toadstool Card
description: A poisonous mushroom creature that releases spores capable of putting others to sleep or poisoning them.

name: Treant Forest Autumn Card
description: A massive tree guardian that controls the forest, summoning roots and vines to crush intruders.

name: Treant Forest Evergreen Card
description: A massive tree guardian that controls the forest, summoning roots and vines to crush intruders.

name: Treant Minion Autumn Card
description: A smaller, yet still formidable, treant that assists its larger kin in protecting the forest.

name: Treant Minion Evergreen Card
description: A smaller, yet still formidable, treant that assists its larger kin in protecting the forest.

name: Treant Tree Autumn Card
description: A sentient tree with a vast network of roots and branches, it can manipulate nature to its will.

name: Treant Tree Evergreen Card
description: A sentient tree with a vast network of roots and branches, it can manipulate nature to its will.

name: Vampire Bat Card
description: A bloodthirsty bat that hunts at night, draining the life force from those it catches.

name: Werewolf Card
description: A fearsome beast that transforms from human to wolf, bringing devastation with its claws and teeth.

name: Whirlwind Card
description: A living funnel of air, whipping up storms and tossing its prey around like leaves.

name: Wind Mage Card
description: A mage who commands the winds, capable of summoning gusts to disorient or damage foes.

name: Wind Card
description: A swift elemental spirit, swirling invisibly until its gusts send you flying off your feet.

name: Wisp Blue Card
description: A pale blue flame that chills the bones as it drifts silently in the dark.

name: Wisp Purple Card
description: A ghostly wisp of violet energy, unpredictable and eerie to behold.

name: Wisp Red Card
description: A fiery spark that dances in the air, eager to set anything ablaze with its touch.

name: Wisp Yellow Card
description: A small floating flame of bright yellow energy, harmless-looking until it swarms.

name: Wolf Pup Card
description: A young wolf that's learning to hunt, quick and agile but still not as deadly as its parents.

name: Wolf Card
description: A swift, strong predator that hunts in packs, known for its loyalty and cunning.

name: Worm Creep Card
description: A giant, burrowing worm that tunnels underground, often causing havoc when it emerges.

name: Worm Rot Card
description: A decayed, undead worm that slithers from the earth, leaving rot in its wake.

name: Worm Stink Card
description: A foul-smelling worm that can incapacitate its enemies with its toxic, rotting stench.

name: Worm Card
description: A smaller version of the giant worm, but still capable of surprising and overwhelming its prey.

name: Zombie Goblin Giant Card
description: A massive goblin brought back in grotesque undeath, lumbering forward with rotten strength.

name: Zombie Goblin Lord Card
description: Once a proud leader, now a rotting husk. This goblin king still commands fear through sheer undeath.

name: Zombie Goblin Minion Card
description: A mindless husk of a goblin, dragged back from death to serve once more in endless war.

name: Zombie Goblin Soldier Card
description: A fallen goblin warrior reanimated, still clutching its crude weapon with decayed resolve.
